headline: Stephens & Co. Maintains Equal-Weight on Builders FirstSource, Lowers Price Target to $100
summary: Stephens & Co.  analyst Trey Grooms   maintains Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $125 to $100.
